indications.text: ARISTADA is indicated for the treatment of schizophrenia in adults [see Clinical Studies (14)].

ARISTADA INITIO, in combination with oral aripiprazole, is indicated for the initiation of
ARISTADA when used for the treatment of schizophrenia in adults.

ARISTADA INITIO, in combination with oral aripiprazole, is indicated for the initiation of
ARISTADA when used for the treatment of schizophrenia in adults.
